vibe: Spiritual, serene, premium, deeply connected to Islamic aesthetics with modern minimalism. Rich jewel tones with gold/brass accents to feel like an elegant prayer mat or historic mosque interior.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-heading font-medium text-amber-500
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight font-heading font-normal text-white

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Bento Grid layout for dashboard. High padding (p-6, p-8) on cards to create a peaceful, uncrowded feel.
layout_spacing.card_style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10
layout_spacing.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#022c22]/80 border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between z-50
layout_spacing.header_style: glassmorphism sticky top-0 z-50 px-6 py-4 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#022c22]/80 border-b border-white/10

prayer_checklist.style: Vertical timeline or elegant list cards. Completed prayers get a soft golden glow (shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(251,191,36,0.2)]) and a checkmark. Uncompleted have a subtle border.
prayer_checklist.behavior: Tap to check off with a soft 'bounce' micro-interaction using framer-motion.

tasbih_counter.style: Massive circular neumorphic/glass button in the center of the screen. Golden border ring that fills up as progress reaches 33/66/99.
tasbih_counter.typography: Huge Playfair Display numbers (text-6xl) in the center.

qibla_compass.style: Glassmorphism circle with an ornate golden needle pointing to Kaaba. Deep green background with subtle degree markings.

badges_levels.style: Octagonal or 8-point Islamic star shapes. Colors change based on level (Foundations: Bronze/Copper, Deepening: Silver, Knowledge: Gold, Radiance: Glowing Emerald).

buttons.primary: bg-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-500 text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-emerald-900/50 hover:bg-emerald-800/50 border border-emerald-700 text-emerald-50 rounded-xl px-6 py-3

images.description: Elegant deep emerald green background with subtle minimalist gold Islamic geometric patterns. MUST use heavily darkened via overlay (bg-black/50) to ensure text legibility.
images.placement: Global app background or dashboard top section.

images.description: Elaborate Islamic architectural details inside a mosque. Very peaceful.
images.placement: Wird section or Meditation mode background, apply a heavy backdrop blur and green/black overlay.

images.description: Brown and black beaded necklace. Earthy, organic feel.
images.placement: Small accent image or blurred background for the Tasbih counter section.

animation_motion.page_transitions: Fade in with a slight upward translation (y: 10 to y: 0) on load.
animation_motion.interactions: All interactive elements must have hover/active states. Buttons should scale down slightly on tap (scale: 0.98).
animation_motion.progress_bars: Smooth width transitions for streak and tasbih progress.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white or light amber text over the deep green backgrounds meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Avoid pure white text on bright gold.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='prayer-fajr-checkbox'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a Mobile-First PWA, meaning the layout should heavily prioritize a max-w-md or max-w-lg container centered on desktop, with a bottom navigation bar.
Install and configure 'lucide-react' for icons (mosque, compass, book, check-circle, etc.).
Use framer-motion heavily for the Tasbih counter (pulse effect on tap), prayer checklist (staggered entrance), and Qibla compass needle.
Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts.
Implement Islamic Geometric UI strictly avoiding over-clutter. Use the 'islamic_bg_main' image carefully as an underlay with a strong gradient mask.
Use Shadcn UI for Tabs, Progress, and Dialogs, but heavily restyle them using the glassmorphism and deep emerald/gold color scheme outlined.
